Bleaching Earth

Adsorbents • Specialty Media

Adsorbents

Bleaching Earth

Bleaching earth is used for decolorization and impurity removal in refining and polishing lines.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Edible oil refining, decolorization, wax polishing
Typical Specifications
Bleaching efficiency, moisture, oil retention, particle size distribution
Grades / Forms
Powder, granules
Technical Notes
Select the grade based on oil type, contact time, and desired bleaching efficiency.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
